title: Jurisdiction
doc_html:
§1870. Jurisdiction

            The Nineteenth Judicial District Court shall have exclusive jurisdiction over any proceeding instituted pursuant to this Chapter.

            Acts 2023, No. 259, §§1, 3A, eff. June 12, 2023.
doc_text:
§1870.  Jurisdiction
The Nineteenth Judicial District Court shall have exclusive jurisdiction over any
proceeding instituted pursuant to this Chapter.
Acts 2023, No. 259, §§1, 3A, eff. June 12, 2023.
